slides.title: Monk Mode Activated.
slides.voiceover: Meet Monk Mode Activated — a discipline tracker built around behavioral science, not the twenty-one day myth.

slides.title: Most habit apps fail you by day 14.
slides.voiceover: Most habit apps fail you around day fourteen. Streak resets, guilt, quit, repeat. Monk Mode treats discipline as a multi-year project, not a twenty-one day stunt.

slides.title: Pick Your Non-Negotiables.
slides.voiceover: Pick your own non-negotiables. The rules you refuse to break — fully customizable per user. No smoking, no doomscroll, no booze. Whatever your hard floor is, you define it.

slides.title: Build Your Habit Stack.
slides.voiceover: Build your own habit stack. Workout, meditate, deep work, cold shower — or whatever moves you forward. One tap per habit. Completion percentage updates instantly.

slides.title: Choose Your Horizon.
slides.voiceover: Choose how long you commit. One month sprint, three month challenge, six month commitment, one year transformation, or two year monk-mode mastery. Your horizon, your call.

slides.title: Daily Todo & Task Tracker.
slides.voiceover: A built-in todo list and task tracker for the day. Add fast, check off fast, resets cleanly at midnight so tomorrow is a fresh start.

slides.title: Journal. Text, Voice, Photos.
slides.voiceover: Journal your day in text, voice, or photos with captions. Whatever medium your day deserves — Monk Mode catches it.

slides.title: The Multi-Year Streak Grid.
slides.voiceover: The streak grid turns daily discipline into a visual identity. Every tile is a day. Every color is a percentage. Skip a day — the streak survives.

slides.title: History + Downloadable PDF Reports.
slides.voiceover: Open the History view to browse any past day in detail. Pick a date range. Download a Summary or Detailed PDF report to analyze the patterns and act on them.

slides.title: Collectibles. Rewards For Every Step.
slides.voiceover: Collectibles reward you for every step you take. Unlockable badges at day seven, thirty, sixty-six, one hundred, and three hundred sixty-five. Classy rewards. No confetti spam.

slides.title: Wrapped — Your Year In Discipline.
slides.voiceover: At year-end, Wrapped builds a Spotify-style recap of your discipline. Best month, longest streak, most-honored habit, and shareable cards.

slides.title: Light Mode. Dark Mode. Smooth Switch.
slides.voiceover: Light mode and dark mode, both first-class. Smooth animated switch — no jarring flash. Your theme preference travels with your account.

Log in with your account and everything syncs to an encrypted database. AES two fifty six at rest. T L S in transit. Row level security so only you can read your rows. Your discipline, encrypted end to database.

slides.title: Chrome Extension Companion.
slides.voiceover: A companion Chrome extension hijacks your new-tab page — turning the place willpower normally dies into a live dashboard of your streak.
Behavioral science says it takes an average of sixty-six days to form a habit — not twenty-one. Monk Mode gives you up to seven hundred and thirty.

slides.title: Start Day 1.
slides.voiceover: Open Productive You dot Lovable dot app, pick your non-negotiables, and start day one.
